name: drawer
description: Persistent side navigation panel with temporary (overlay) and permanent (inline) variants. Swipe-to-dismiss, safe-area aware, and responsive.

props.name: visible
props.description: Whether the drawer is open. Ignored in permanent variant.

props.name: onClose
props.description: Called when the user dismisses the drawer. Only fires in temporary variant.

props.name: children
props.description: Navigation content rendered inside the drawer.

props.name: variant
props.description: temporary = overlay with backdrop; permanent = always visible inline.

props.name: side
props.description: Which edge the drawer slides from.

props.name: width
props.description: Drawer width. Fraction of screen width for temporary (default 0.75), fixed px for permanent (default 280).

props.name: hideBackdrop
props.description: Hide the semi-transparent backdrop in temporary mode.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the drawer surface.
